identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a distinct, high-performance SaaS dashboard that avoids generic 'AI slop'. Focus on clarity, data density, and a 'command center' aesthetic.
identity.tone: Swiss & High-Contrast (Authority, Clarity) mixed with The Performance Pro (Precision).

usage.code: JetBrains Mono (Regular), slate-700, bg-slate-50, px-1 rounded

usage.primary_button: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 shadow-md hover:shadow-lg transition-all

colors.dark_mode_strategy: The prompt prioritizes a white content area with navy elements. Default to light mode, but ensure dark mode variables are set in `index.css` for future proofing. Dark mode should use slate-950 bg and slate-900 cards.

layout.grid_system: Use CSS Grid. For Dashboard: 'grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6'.

style_rules.card: rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200
style_rules.button: rounded-md font-medium transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-slate-950 focus-visible:ring-offset-2
style_rules.input: rounded-md border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-white file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-500 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-slate-950 focus-visible:ring-offset-2
style_rules.badge: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-950 focus:ring-offset-2 border-transparent bg-slate-900 text-slate-50 hover:bg-slate-900/80

custom_modifications.calendar: Ensure customization to match brand colors

visual_enhancers.shadows: Use layered shadows for depth. 'shadow-sm' for cards, 'shadow-md' for active elements.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid borders are critical for the 'Swiss' clean look. Use 'border-slate-200'.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use sparingly. Only for sticky headers or floating overlays: 'bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-slate-200/50'.
visual_enhancers.micro_interactions: Buttons scale down slightly on click ('active:scale-95'). Links have a subtle underline animation.

rules: Entrance animations: Staggered fade-in for dashboard cards.
Hover effects: Subtle lift (-2px) for interactive cards.

instructions_to_main_agent.general: Build a 'TokenLens' dashboard. It is an API cost intelligence tool. Use the provided colors and fonts. The aesthetic should be 'Navy & Teal' - clean, professional, and data-focused.
instructions_to_main_agent.layout_structure: Use a Top Navigation bar (Sticky, Navy Blue). The main content area is White/Gray. Use a Dashboard Grid layout for the main view.
instructions_to_main_agent.mock_data: Use realistic data for API costs (OpenAI/Anthropic models like gpt-4, claude-3-opus). Use the provided avatars for the 'Top Users' table.
instructions_to_main_agent.charts: Use 'recharts'. Customize the tooltips to be clean (white bg, shadow-lg, no border). Use the defined chart colors.

universal_guidelines.css: Do NOT use 'transition: all'. Use specific transitions. Ensure text contrast meets APCA/WCAG standards.
universal_guidelines.clean_code: Remove unused CSS from App.css. Use Tailwind utility classes for layout and spacing.
universal_guidelines.imports: Use named exports for components, default exports for pages.
